name: Special Capybara
description: These herbivores, which often dwell close to the water, are famous for their steely, stoic "won't even twitch if lightning strikes right next to their toes" disposition. Tourists hail them as the gold standard of animal companions.\nUnfortunately, their unique coloring has made them a target for smugglers. Yet, even after being trafficked thousands of miles from their home in Natlan, liberated only to face a Hilichurl's bubbling pot, they remain utterly unfazed. Such a temperament is, quite frankly, nothing short of admirable.
